name: core.openwop.workflows.market-intel
description: Real-work workflow pack (RFC 0013, ADR 0149/0150). A competitive / market-intelligence digest authored entirely over PUBLISHED node packs (vendor.myndhyve.market-intel-* + core.openwop.ai), so it expands + runs on any conformant host. The thin-slice proof that the real-work workflows publish to packs.openwop.dev. Published under the `core.openwop.workflows.*` namespace (openwop-team signing key); the registry adds `signing` at publish time.
author: openwop
